since_last: 76% of 100 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.19%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 76% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.79% · BTC -0.42% · Gold -0.47% · Nasdaq100 -1.88%. 76% of 100 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.19%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.19%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.58%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: IBM is the standout at -24.30%
cards.body: Leaders: LRCX +7.43%, INTC +6.99%, AMAT +6.62%, KLAC +6.44%, ASML +6.28%. Laggards: IBM -24.30%, ISRG -6.07%, ADBE -4.00%, SAP -3.30%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.68% at $137.0
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.68% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
